metadata.description: AI agent skills for the Prompsit Translation API CLI. Install CLI, request API access, translate text/documents, evaluate quality, score parallel corpora, and annotate monolingual data.

plugins.name: prompsit
plugins.description: Prompsit Translation API: CLI setup, text/document translation, quality evaluation (BLEU, chrF, MetricX), parallel corpus scoring (Bicleaner), monolingual data annotation (Monotextor).
